title: Families/Friends of Individuals With a Drug Use Disorder Support Groups - 211info
text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Mental & Behavioral Health > Families/Friends of Individuals With a Drug Use Disorder Support Groups 2 Matching Service Providers Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF FAMILIES ANONYMOUS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF A 12-step support program for families and friends of individuals with drug, alcohol, or related behavioral issues. Support group meetings are available both in person and online depending on the area. Audio and video recordings available on agency website. Locator Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Varies by service Email (800) 736-9805 Visit Website More Details NAR-ANON FAMILY GROUPS NAR-ANON GROUPS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 12-step program for family and friends of people with drug addictions. 23110 Crenshaw Boulevard Suite A Torrance, CA 90505 Eligibility: Individuals affected by the drug addiction of someone close to them Hours: Varies Email (800) 477-6291 Get Directions Visit Website More Details No Mapping Information Available
